questions.question: What is a polynomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial is an algebraic expression with non-negative integer powers of variables.

questions.question: What is the degree of a polynomial?
questions.answer: The degree of a polynomial is the highest power of the variable.

questions.question: What is a linear polynomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial of degree one is called a linear polynomial.

questions.question: What is a quadratic polynomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial of degree two is called a quadratic polynomial.

questions.question: What is a cubic polynomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial of degree three is called a cubic polynomial.

questions.question: What is a constant polynomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial with only a constant term is called a constant polynomial.

questions.question: What is the degree of a non-zero constant polynomial?
questions.answer: The degree of a non-zero constant polynomial is zero.

questions.question: What is the degree of the zero polynomial?
questions.answer: The degree of the zero polynomial is not defined.

questions.question: What is a zero of a polynomial?
questions.answer: A zero of a polynomial is a value of the variable for which the polynomial becomes zero.

questions.question: What are the zeroes of a polynomial also called?
questions.answer: The zeroes of a polynomial are also called its roots.

questions.question: What is the graph of a linear polynomial?
questions.answer: The graph of a linear polynomial is a straight line.

questions.question: What is the graph of a quadratic polynomial called?
questions.answer: The graph of a quadratic polynomial is called a parabola.

questions.question: How many zeroes can a linear polynomial have at most?
questions.answer: A linear polynomial can have at most one zero.

questions.question: How many zeroes can a quadratic polynomial have at most?
questions.answer: A quadratic polynomial can have at most two zeroes.

questions.question: How many zeroes can a cubic polynomial have at most?
questions.answer: A cubic polynomial can have at most three zeroes.

questions.question: What does the x-intercept of a graph represent?
questions.answer: The x-intercept of a graph represents a zero of the polynomial.

questions.question: What is the standard form of a linear polynomial?
questions.answer: The standard form of a linear polynomial is ax + b.

questions.question: What is the standard form of a quadratic polynomial?
questions.answer: The standard form of a quadratic polynomial is ax² + bx + c.

questions.question: What is the coefficient of x² in a quadratic polynomial?
questions.answer: The coefficient of x² is a.

questions.question: What is the constant term of the polynomial 3x² + 2x + 5?
questions.answer: The constant term is 5.

questions.question: What is the value of p(0) equal to?
questions.answer: p(0) is equal to the constant term of the polynomial.

questions.question: What is a monomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial having only one term is called a monomial.

questions.question: What is a binomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial having two terms is called a binomial.

questions.question: What is a trinomial?
questions.answer: A polynomial having three terms is called a trinomial.

questions.question: What determines the maximum number of zeroes of a polynomial?
questions.answer: The degree of the polynomial determines the maximum number of zeroes.
